channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: The LINK token has value — 91 replies — 364.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The LINK token has value

Open thread • Replies: 91 • Updated: 2026-05-06 21:27 UTC

OP

The LINK token has value

Early replies (first 3)

62176216
New Chainlink report
https://bitwiseinvestments.com/crypto-market-insights/chainlink-in-plain-english

62176226
>>62176214
>In many cases, nodes must stake LINK before they can provide and be compensated for their services. If they provide incorrect data, they are penalized and lose a portion of the LINK they have staked. This system helps ensure the integrity of Chainlink’s services while also
reducing the free-floating supply of LINK.
Speaking in present tense. I assume this and the and the other clues we've seen in the past couple weeks mean staking imminent?

62176244
>>62176226
What other clues

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62190282
>>62190186
Are these the mechanisms that will allow chainlink token holders to sue for equity?

62190912
So... it was all fake huh?
Glad my gut instinct told me to sell

62191218
>>62190282
the only people who would try that are VC types who didn't buy early enough

62192644
>>62184641
None of the numbers have been confirmed by anybody.

62192801
>people still talking about $link
shit like polymarket is literally the perfect use-case for something like chainlink, and yet, they don't use it in any major prediction market.
why do you delusional retards still believe?

62192822
>>62192644
many numbers confirmed. you can estimate
>>62176336

62192854
>>62192822
>where is the proof from all those off-chain payments?
>look at muh cumulative graphs bro!
are you legitimately retarded?

62192867
>>62192822
How many times did Sergey drill "truth > trust" and "mathematically guaranteed" for people to completely glaze over it? Like he just diluted the concept from overspamming it.

62192888
>>62192644
>>62192854
The fuck are you talking about "confirmed", the quote is about other projects saying they're paying CLL millions. Ask them for confirmation of what THEY are saying.
Charles said something similar btw.

>>62192867
Truth > trust is about how the network works. Not CLL's internal revenues; nobody ever promised you "truth" about that.

62192901
>>62192888
Only low functioning autists and GME type of normies don't see the obvious bad optics of it.

62192907
It’s insane how obsessed fudders are with this. Every day for years.

62192909
>>62192888
so zero proof of all those off-chain payments?
the only proof that exists is Zach's anecdote from an irrelevant podcast 3 years ago?
yikes

62192925
>>62192901
Bad optics of what? Private companies having private company accounting?

>>62192909
There's plenty of proof, lots of cryptos had public DAO votes about Chainlink integration and rates.
Lots of anecdotes from projects themselves too, like Hoskinson saying CLL would charge him an "absurd number" for direct Cardano integration.

Step out of your bubble

62192926
>>62192907
I can assure you most "fudder" are high 6 figs in link.
It's you triple digit baggies thinking you'll buy a lambo soon that are deluded

62192938
>>62192926
lol @ ESL
I can assure you most fuddies are brown niggers that don't hold any LINK

62192940
>>62192925
>lots of cryptos had DAO votes
>zero cryptos mentioned
>lots of anecdotes from projects
>the only anecdote that's been repeated ad nauseam is the known scammer Hoskinson when referring to his vaporware blockchain pet project
the absolute STATE of LINK shills

62192962
>>62192938
Really going to make me dev that crypto ZKP attestation gated signal group to filter out you pot smokers.

62192982
>>62192938
we fuddies are richer than you can even possibly imagine
due to our wealth, we are basically a different species altogether
a super species that can no longer breed with inferiors such as yourself

62192984
>>62192888
>duuuuuuuude everyone else needs to be truthful except us


hey kid, did you notice your cult stopped using the ollll truth>trust after they got called out?

they grifted you, and here you are begging for their approval

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62192988
>>62192925
>duuuuuuuuude one of the top grifters in crypto history charles said my cult was expensive

there you have it folks, irrefutable truth

62193165
>>62192940
>>62192984
>>62192988
I mean you don't have to believe it or look it up even.

62193169
>>62176477
do you have any response to >>62176598 ?
If you don't that proves you are either
A) stupid bot
B) stupid nigerian
C) angry fudder
D) link holder trying desperately to fud others away from the best moonshot there is.
in any case, everyone can just ignore you: )

62193244
>>62192982
nigga no one is breeding with you KEK

>>62192988
or you lul

brownies rekt once again

62193356
>>62176295
Yes anon. One last step. It's always one more thing. Linkies always dangling new carrots to scam new anons. Get fucked, baggie

62195762
>>62193356
hi! stay mad about link, post in link threads too
>>62192854
>where is the proof from all those off-chain payments
"guy just give me the list of private business transactions. you know the ones where chainlink has negotiated price and terms with each private business partner"
You can see that the Chainlink reserve continues to grow, and payment abstraction means link is bought with onchain and offchain payments. To know more, you'll need to search.

62195773
>>62195762
Chainlink understands how privacy is needed for industry, too

62196215
Pretty sad how the LINK shills cling onto their delusion of financial freedom in the year 2017+9

62196318
>>62177980
Its kinda crazy that the whole amount of link left is only worth 2b while ripple dumps this every month lmao

62196466
>>62196318
They should sell it all at once so we can buy the crash and make it during the ensuing bullrun

62199072
>>62192644
Yeah no one has confirmed it
... except the actual parties themselves saying directly in interviews that they're paying for it

kill yourself, subhuman faggot

Day 292 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $100

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-05-06 21:27 UTC

OP

Day 292 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $100

Early replies (first 3)

62191621
>>62191618
Keep going buddy, we believe in you

62191745
>>62191618
go chainlink snail!

62191750
>>62191618
cute

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62192270
keep on beliebing

https://youtu.be/AvWAURbr9fo?t=45

62194140
include the price change since the last post

62194190
Yeah

62195335
fuck stinks

62199077
Please.

I bought some sub 10, but then after it was $20 and sinking I kept buying more. IDK how much i even have.

item.title: Where's the best place to live in USA if you're making just $110k a year? — 38 replies — 96.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Where's the best place to live in USA if you're making just $110k a year?

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-05-06 21:13 UTC

OP

Where's the best place to live in USA if you're making just $110k a year?

Early replies (first 3)

62197704
>>62197690
Asians don't live in Oklahoma. Fake

62197712
>>62197690
>>62197704
Also, nobody thinks about Oklahoma and she's appropriating Texan culture

62197713
>>62197690
MN was nice and cheap

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62197771
>>62197767
kek

62197776
>>62197690
Rural Central texas

62197777
I ate rice and beans for years after I got out of school. Git gud.

62197789
>>62197690
Kek people who moved to USA instead of Europe are seeing the mistake they made and going mad

62197803
Tennesse no doubt. At 2600/month after tax i was saving 1800 of it, easily. A few years ago to be fair. Now I have 90 after taxes and save 70 with some lifestyle increases. I’m 27 now and I’ve got 480k saved. I’m aiming for buying a nice house outright + 1.5m then retiring in Florida. Hoping by 40

Not gonna have kids either I’m just going to be permanently fucking my FOTM 18-20 year olds for life, which I’m already doing.

62197805
>>62197690
California

62197811
>>62197789
america is 100 times better than europe in every aspect. i could be making ten times more over there than in europoor and living like a king, but instead I’m stuck getting taxed to hell and living like a rat. I’m thinking of going to the U.S for a while and maybe finding a wife there to finally put an end to this whole mess

62197868
>>62197803
Now give some suggestions to those of us that don’t live with parents
Because I’m calling big bullshit on being able to love on $20k a year independently in the big 26

62197913
>>62197811
Yeah go there and even your retarded ass will see how good you had it under the protection of EU.

62198013
>>62197803
It's already over for TN. It was the most moved to state in history during the pandemic and still is to this day. It's very quickly going to turn into eastern california in the next 2 or 3 years.

62198047
>>62197777
Is nobody going to check these quads good grief

62198073
>>62198061
That's where she like the BWC

62198083
>>62197777
4choon is dead. These quads have been up for over an hour and not one of you assholes checked 'em

62198096
>>62197690
i don't care about backet weavers which she clearly is one

62198103
>>62197777
>>62198047

stop posting that south american cryptozionist food truck girl, man. /int/ already did the phenotype breakdown and family tree investigation.

62198120
>>62197690
as far away from that crazy bitch as possible

62198182
>>62198120
i want to marry her

62198312
>>62198182
probably because you also have severe mental problems

62198389
>>62198312
yes. it will result in mind shattering crashout sex

62198507
>>62197690
Oklahoma is actually pleasant if you're a white person.

62198798
>>62198061
Fishhead, kek

62198802
>>62197704
some of the most famous oklahomans are asian

62198841
>oklahoma
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DlC6N_x4lRA

62198863
>>62197913
And so the brain drain continues, lol

62198920
>>62197713
>MN was nice and cheap
Why would anybody willingly move to the arctic version of Somalia?

62198981
>>62198013
It seriously is, I can hardly drive on the roads anymore and all I see are license plates from blue shitholes like NY and CaliforniaZ Alcoa highway is so congested compared to 6 years ago, it’s dismal. Every restaurant packed, every road a line of cars here in Knoxville.

62198989
>>62198013
>>62198981
Nashville already sucked in 2020 Knoxville is falling as we speak.

62199004
>>62197690
why do we consider chinks humans

62199028
>>62197690
Why do roasties hate the country so much and just want to live in the big cities?

item.title: DAMN THOSE ARE NICE CANNONS! — 23 replies — 92.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
DAMN THOSE ARE NICE CANNONS!

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-05-06 21:25 UTC

OP

>Two new witnesses come forward in case against JP Morgan exec Lorna Hajdani, accused of making her subordinate Chirayu Rana her sex slave.
>One saw the 'naked' manager arrive at Rana's apartment, saying she 'owns Rana'
>Another saw her 'kissing Rana's neck and grabbing him'

Early replies (first 3)

62197226
>>62197194
Ngl those two do look like a freaky couple.

62197235
let's guess the group affiliation of these "witnesses"

62197261
>>62197194
It's only a matter of time before we get messages of her sending nudes to Rana and other "sex slave", and I can't wait

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62197268
>>62197235
My first thought as well
>we're all gonna get so much izzat!

62197312
>>62197194
>>One saw the 'naked' manager arrive at Rana's apartment
Why are jeets so retarded? Why can't they make up fake shit without exaggerating so much?

62197382
>>62197194
>One saw the 'naked' manager arrive at Rana's apartment
So he was walking naked on the streets? I'm having hard time understanding this kind of 'english'

62197499
what's up with his eyes

62197550
>>62197235
>>62197268
Pretty sure one of them is literally Rana’s cousin.

62197638
>>62197550
Pretty sure they're all cousins and the family tree is fucking straight

62198077
>>62197194
>apple ipone
>faggot color
Hes cooked

62198105
>>62197312
>>62197382
>>62197499
>>62198077
it's ai you dumbasses.

62198119
>>62198077
Holy shit is vitalik’s dick really that big??

62198131
>>62197235
Believe us saars!

62198170
>>62198105
not what i said, regardless his eyes still fucking look like that

62198307
>>62198170
cope. and learn to spot ai better, or you're going to be in for a real tough time.

62198329
>>62198307
>dodges the point entirely
>cope
Is 'cope' the new retort for
>yes, I'm third world and terminally retarded. Plz do the needful and forget that I can't follow a conversation
?
Because I've been seeing it a LOT lately in that exact context

62198415
>>62198329
i am the only one in this thread that even questioned the op being ai while you fell for it and you're accusing me of being a third world retard lmfao

62198505
>>62197235
Brahmin not lie sir

62198555
>>62198415
>I am da smartestest
So, I'm getting an emphatic yes to my original question.
Whatever internet points you believe to have garnered won't help you read

62198576
>>62198555
so far in your two responses to me you have shown that you have no abstract reasoning ability and are worse at parsing information than an llm from 2 years ago. for that reason i am assuming you're likely also a cheap ai bot and i am done responding to you lol.

62198619
>>62198576
>never make a single claim about the veracity of the pic in op, instead claim the whole thing is likely a scam in my first shitpost
>ACKSHUALLY ITS A SCAM AND IM THE ONLY ONE THAT SEES IT. YOUR ALL A BIG DUMB PLUS BOTS
That's been both of our contributions to this point. The original anon you replied to was asking about his weird ghoulish sanpaku eyes, but you disregarded that info entirely to fabricate your point. I'm glad you won't be responding to this post ;^}

62198793
saaaaaaaaaaar the white womens make us sexslave !!!!!!!!!!

62199066
>>62197261
Based
>>62197194
It’s over

item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-05-06 20:32 UTC

OP

and Viola! Just like that, Chainlink will NEVER be below $10 again.

Early replies (first 3)

62195955
>>62195946
Unironically true this time

62195960
>>62195955
checked

62195997
>>62195946
>Viola
The viola is a string instrument of the violin family, and is usually bowed when played. The viola is slightly larger than the violin and has a lower sound.

Kys brownoid

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62196411
>>62195955
we made it bros

62196422
>>62195955
>>62196411
digits confirm, brown retards lose

62196776
linkchads stay winning ong

62196783

62196785
>>62196422
Holy checked

62196800
>>62195955
>>62196411
>>62196422

62196927
check the chart muutard

62196928
>>62195997

62196951
Lmao of course bitcoin dumped hard

62196969
>>62196800
blessed thread

62196981
>>62196969

absolutely based

>>62196951
Yup. Seems like $10 is the new suppression level for now.

62197025

Oh my fucking god i need to get in on this shit

62197070
>>62195946
>>62195955
you retards need to stop this
we are NEVER going to moon because everytime we get excited it backfires
literally under $10 again for the 100th time
next time it goes over $10 just don't say anything okay?

62197079
>>62197070

Checked, and tell it to Bitcoin.

62197091
it's fucking over

62197138

62197148

xD

62197153
>>62196981
>Yup. Seems like $10 is the new suppression level for now.
No bitcoin just can't break the totally organic resistance level of $81,719 ackshuallly

62197177
>>62197153

62197220
>>62195946
chainlink solves the lambo problem

62197227
we're so back

62197249
>>62197153
so who's actually behind it? Jane street? Binance?

62197278
This coin only exists to keep eyes off of Chainlink at this point. Fucking ridiculous. At least it gives me more motivation to keep buying and never sell.

62197288
>>62197278

62198378
>>62195946
The number keeps going up

62198799
Uh... Its below $10 again....

62198886
deluded stinkies, i'll be back in an hour or two for the follow up

item.title: The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization. — 75 replies — 17.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization.

Open thread • Replies: 75 • Updated: 2026-05-06 17:19 UTC

OP

The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy
Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization. It is the accumulated result of tax cuts without matching reductions in spending, an aging population drawing more heavily on Social Security and Medicare, and years of political leadership on both sides of the aisle that has consistently chosen short-term popularity over long-term solvency.
You fags are cooked (including me)

Early replies (first 3)

62179629
Doesn’t matter, because no one can collect from the US Govt

Refute this without sounding mad

62179630
>>62179622
breaking news: voters want stuff and dont want to pay for it

62179853
>>62179622
AI will fix this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62183137
>>62179928
>300 million all of a sudden joining together because of some anon's stupid chest-pounding fantasy
>t. retard who's been somehow asleep the past year

62183141
>>62179622
All you have to do is cut to 2019 spending levels and we would have a surplus.
That's how crazy Congressional spending has increased since Covid.

62184058
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aDAL5G9Xwn4&list=RDaDAL5G9Xwn4
https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777749403133051.png

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4ZHwu0uut3k&list=RD4ZHwu0uut3k
>[720p]
https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777749468586523.jpg

62184159
>>62179629
Most of the US debt isn't from foriegn countries. It's US themselves. US Pension & retirement funds, US investment firms, US etfs etc. If US defaults you'll see US citizens and companies lose money. Holding US treasuriers aren't going to be worth as much since US isn't going to meet its obligations. Companies and people will lose a lot money. Contraction of the economy will happen for years due to this cycle. You'll also see a stock market crash and the decades of growth will vanish because nobody will want to lend to the US at similar rates. It'll probably be as bad as the great depression if not worse.


Hopefully this happens and I can a US citizen as a slave wagie.

62184174
>>62180399
This is not a survey of people willing to fight for their country; it's a survey of people willing to click "yes" on an internet poll. The reality would be a tiny tiny fraction of that number.

62184182
>>62184174
Dude we literally go to europe and beat the fuck out of your pickpocket niggers and muslims if they fuck with us. Realistically only 5 million Americans would be needed to beat europe down like dogs

62184190
>>62179629
The US depends on people continuing to buy its debt, just to fund ongoing expenses

62184198
>>62180442
>eliminate all taxes for people making less than ~75k a year
Uh, lower taxes won't help the debt.

>block immigration
More people = more tax revenue

62184199
>>62184190
Just like all country?

62184207
>>62184199
There are countries that run small or no deficits and could cope quite well with zero net debt issuance.

62184218
>>62180410
india has like 1.4 billion people the self-hating white obsessed ones you see in the west represent a tiny fraction the actual ones in india are all retarded jingoists or muslims

62184243
>>62184182
That's cute but every single time in the past 30 years that you guys have had an opportunity to show that you're not all talk, you've rolled over like bitches. Off the top of my head:
>allowing cops to go door to door confiscating guns during katrina
>allowing military to go door to door conducting warrantless searches after the boston marathon bombing
>hiding in your house posting on twitter while mobs of leftists took over entire cities while completely crippling police forces and burning down police stations during the george floyd riots
You lives are too comfortable to ever risk them. You have fun larping online but we all know that the only people willing to risk their lives in the real world are those with either strong convictions or little to lose and we both know that you have a lot to lose and don't really believe in anything.

The only time Americans show any balls is when there's a call for people to die for Israel.

62184279
>>62179622
>>62179629
>Doesn’t matter, because no one can collect from the US Govt
>>62179928
>Come and take the debt
funny to see americans think the debt is owed to other countries instead of its own people.

62184305
>>62184279
forgot pic related

62184336
>>62179622
>Cut defense spending
>Cut medicare
>Cut social security
>Tax rich people, tax the middle class, tax the working class, tax the poor, tax your mom. Tax your Grandma. Everyone's getting picked up, flipped over around shaken for money and needs to get over it.
>Inflate the currency
>Keep every other program because those those don't actually matter that much. In fact, add more.
>Ignore culture wars. Ignore culture clowns.
>Pay our doomer, meme-brained, low IQ, lazy and angertainment-addicted public a few pennies to go to the park to end the loneliness epidemic and polarization and just go outside and see how human beings function
>Cut the "muh affordability" meme subsidizes. We're adults. Show them the real bill and just stop it.
>Nuclear, Wind and Solar power. Shut up about the rest.
>Viciously murder zoning, car centricity and nimby laws on public television
Amendment guaranteeing that you have to let people build houses on land they buy provided it's not a safety or environmental hazard.
>Respect law outcomes, but persecute each and every corrupt official no matter what to where you make Watergate look like a peace rally compared it.
>Expose every grifter. They might not be prosecutable, but they will be known.
>Spew TRVTHS daily and nightly no matter who it hurts (including yourself)
There. Fixed your country.

Do you think the average American won't do this because they're afraid won't work or because we are afraid of seeing the infeasibility and sunk cost of the current American lifestyle?

62184343
>>62184207
Such as?

62184400
>>62179629
Eventually the dollar collapses though and bond yields spike because people demand higher and higher interest on what's a collapsing dollar

62187354
>>62184058

https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777750871226027.jpg
https://cdn.donmai.us/sample/a2/1a/__gunsmith_bitch_panty_stocking_with_garterbelt_drawn_by_sketchinventor__sample-a21abc6dafbdafd9ed6c0893528de850.jpg

62188579
>>62181550
This
>>62179928
>Come and take the debt
You are genuinely retarded. Slavery needs to come back, all races.

62188593
>>62179622
>You fags are cooked (including me)

62188936
>>62184343
Surplus: Norway, Denmark
Minor deficit: Sweden

62192220
>>62188593
Yummy

62193530
>>62179629
Food
>America is food secure
Unti AI agriculture was the most subsidized industry in the country.

62193681
>>62184336
Just re-arrange american healthcare and social security system. Private healthcare and private education are incredibly costly.

62193707
>>62184336
The system more than likely is incapable of being fixed at this point and cutting benefits is political suicide.

62193761
>>62193707
The fix is inflation. They'll keep running it hot to inflate away the debt while forcing bond rates lower artificially.

62194225
>>62179622
Doesn't matter its all fabricated when the fed can print infinitely

62194394
>>62179629
The world stopping to use of the US dollar as the de-facto reserve currency and universal trade tender is not something the US in its current state can survive tho.

Any other country in the world would be facing the greatest hyperinflation event ever seen if they did the shit the US is doing. They're the only things barely preventing it right now.

62194405
>>62184336
you assume things aren't being played out exactly as intended

62197937
>>62179622
me when bi dl trade verbal dom

item.title: No one is talking about how there's no jobs. — 78 replies — 10.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
No one is talking about how there's no jobs.

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-05-06 14:29 UTC

OP

No one is talking about how there's no jobs. Ive been working for 10 years and never seen the market nearly this fucked up. Every job is fake, they will interview for 3 or 4 rounds and still repost the job next week, after ghosting people of course. People irl are coping so hard. Im back for my masters and not one person has any job or internship in any of my classes this or previous semester except me(and I will get laid off soon). These zoomers are so fucking deluded. They cant get an internship so they say "of well, im just gonna focus on finishing my masters". Is this how THEY are getting away with it? Society has already brainwashed people so badly the people in charge can drink their milkshake and leave them destitute and they wont even notice?

Early replies (first 3)

62184289
>>62184286
skill issue. ggf &c

62184301
>>62184289
All these interviews just happened to not like me or anyone else they interviewed and reposted the job? What a coincidence. Crazy how i had skills for the past 10 years and always instantly found a job but something randomly happened and now I lost whatever skills I have as I got good excperince in my fields

62184315
>>62184301
Oh and here is the email from my on-site interview on may 4th i got on friday. Nevermind it was my drram company and this tore my fucking hear out. Skill issue on my part that they canceled the role..

Oh and this is only 2/3 of all my interviews this past months if u count phone calls

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62187058
>>62186790
Cemeteries are full of men who were certain they were irreplaceable.

62187063
>>62184556
My best friend worked in multiple industries for said cross domain knowledge, but not for a sad 90k in Muttmerica, but 200k in Europe (equivalent to 800k in Muttmerica, but something like 70k net in socialist Europe). Recently unemployed due to the IT company going bust, he exhausted his network, zero job interviews.

>>62186790
Clearly the people on top are not replaceable due to their superhuman skills.
Don't even try, I have a company doing something specialized for luxury real estate. My mother was a social worker dealing with retardation, her clients were way more skilled and grown up than mine are today.

62187071
>>62184286
Men are checking out of society at an alarming rate and the trend will only continue.

62187078
>>62187071
And that is very welcomed by everyone who is rich. Less competition, more resources, more fun in life. Check out and get marginalized in a pod. Die early, unnoticed.

62187106
>>62184286
Just say you're trans. Once hired you can say you're de transing. Should give you a job in 2 weeks.

62187112
>>62187106
Relevant already a few years ago

62187120
>>62187063
>Clearly the people on top are not replaceable due to their superhuman skills.
i work at a fortune 10 company. the board fired the CFO and CEO after these "superhumans" blew up the price by being retarded and incompetent. they were replaced in a matter of months. no one is irreplaceable. business talent is largely a retarded meme.

62187124
>>62184366
Why can’t you spell? Are you drunk because you didn’t get the job at the vapourware company?

62187126
>>62187120
**blew up the stock price

62188258
>>62185827
die-versity hire, they're probably looking for a nig of some sort. Probably not an indian though or else they'd have filled it lol.

Or perhaps you're flagged on some sort of secret 'no-hire' list for being edgy online or whatever. My workplace has a secret 'do not rehire' list that the employees aren't supposed to know about, and the way we found out was that the woman who resigned was flagged for it, she was one of the last people us coworkers would have predicted was tagged for it.

62188279
>>62186790
if the governments of the world totally shut off immigration to suit this reality, i'd not be concerned, the problem is they want to import an endless legion of turd world subhumans into the west at the same time as there's no real jobs left for the citizens. Whilst promoting their globohomo bloodsports in Ukraine and the ME.

>come white man, enlist! we only let you get the gig when we need goyim to die for lsraeI! heres you're chance!

62188591
>>62184289
>skill issue.
reddit post.

62188606
>>62184286
>they will interview for 3 or 4 rounds
By the way, they totally could figure it out in one interview. But they string you along for 3+ interviews because they think it's funny.

62188643
>>62184286
Just learn to prompt

62188765
>>62184556
>Reality is an IQ test, what do you think your IQ is?
So my boss must be smarter than me...that's why im retiring in 3 years and that fucker will be slaving until 80

62188796
>>62186790
Which is why those ideologies are either dumb or evil tempting.

62188815
>>62188279
It’s funny how you mix Ukraine with some jewish conspiracy.

62188832
>>62188796
No, communism is evil and everyone who promotes communism is a soulless monster.

62188926
>>62188815
>>62188832
Israeli IP

62188963
you laughed at le trade meme
hahhahahah
I can work anywhere I want, more jobs then I can shake a stick at, getting phone calls about asking if Im available for dispatch, sorry currently employed!

62190507
>>62185702
That all just sounds like bullshit

>>62187055
Huh? If the count was based on people who want a job why are you talking about slavery

62190516
>>62185827
>>62188258
Those are just an obnoxious type of ghost listing
https://www.fastcompany.com/91019872/employers-are-intentionally-leaving-job-openings-unfilled-heres-why

62190529
capitalism doesn't work
king now
kill jew
sell orc inc mik wop feminists
force abourt preg not want
free slave girls n rooms for white male engineer, everyone else 0 money
red lights gone instead put road circle small
highway have middle u turn lanes, no overpass
flibe.com free power
greenarrays.com replaces computing university school lawyer movies games net etc.
more barges n canals
monorails
trains
etc
dymaxion car burning hydrogen in stirling engine exhaust water
dam huge waterway for hydroelectric
100% white west playground :)
king all the way

62192053
>>62188815
kys shill-rat.
>>62188832
agreed, thats why i hate kikes, they invented communism in their kike-think-tanks, weaponised it and unleashed it on Russia+china, and the world. Kikes are either directly, or indirectly, behind 95% of all human suffering for the last ~200 years.

62194013
>>62184286
Everyone is talking about that - on plebbit and normie sites. This board is for retards with $3000 saved to gamble it on shitcoins dreaming of becoming a millionaire.

62194027
>>62185045
>network engineer
>CompTIA
Doubt. Even a CCNA won't get you a job.
CompTIA is basically worthless.

62194055
>>62184286
>Ive been working for 10 years

Woah, woah, woah Hold up there gramps.

I haven't seen attack ships on fire off the shoulder of Orion, but I am getting video interviews at least. The problem is usually the company will cuck out at the last minute and cancel the req before I get a chance to start. I've been between jobs now for 8 months, almost 10% of your career, and it happens quite a bit. I suggest you pick up a book. Maybe pass the 3 CFA exams. Until everyone learns to stop being faggots about AI, we're in for a bumpy ride because galaxy brains like yourself think you can automate and forget it. Some businesses will have to get fucked up first THEN they can start hiring humans again

62194083
>>62188643
this is serious

>>62188963
you'll be poorer than you ever imagined soon

>>62190529
this. I would like to subscribe thank you

62194913
>>62194027
even tho the faggot you replied to was replying to me, I believe his story. I joined a contractor IT job and they had many clients whom I got to interact with. Every single one of them liked me and boasted about the work i did. I reached out to the one i liked most when I was ready to rejoin employment after a year break and they swooped me up with no interview or credential checking. I do not have any certs, dropped out of college since it was a meme and a scam and learned everything through projects I was doing based from my hobbies (gaming).
>certs, degrees, etc are useless in clown world
>proof of work always works, like BTC if your proof of work is amazing YOU WILL BE SOUGHT OUT
>after a year of interacting with AIs, i asked them to give me an IQ estimate based upon our interactions and all of them told me 135+
While you are worrying about wasting time "meeting" their requirements for work, employers are wasting time meeting my requirements to work for them. You and I are not the same

62197152
>>62184413
Try saying that in public to 1/4 of the population and see what happens.

item.title: It’s not a bubble — 8 replies — 7.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
It’s not a bubble

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-05-06 20:36 UTC

OP

It’s just a new paradigm

>As of April 2026, Anthropic's annualized revenue run rate has surpassed $30 billion, driven by enterprise API usage, up from approximately $9 billion in late 2025. While rapidly growing, the company is not currently profitable due to massive capital expenditures on AI infrastructure, including a $200 billion, 5-year commitment to cloud services.

Early replies (first 3)

62198820
>ratio
Advertising account that gets swamped into feeds and ignored and likely blocked the moment any human comes across. Irrelevant. Go advertise your ad account somewhere else

62198822
>promise to buy mag7 slop
>mag7 earnings go up
>mag7 then commit to buy more of your slop
>everybody wins

“Not circular”

62198831
>>62198820

Take your medicine

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62198832
and OPis also confirmed a bot.
4chan is worse than moltbook

62198861
>>62198820

62198865
Who are you social signaling to bot, yourself?

62198890
>>62198817
This is the AI supercycle. Nasdaq is going to 40k. 10x long now or get left behind.

62198903
>>62198890
>my index scam that mostly went number up due to a demographic group that turned negative cashflow last year is going to keep going up
>please buy my bag
how about no. Pension funds have no other option left anymore to fulfil their contractual obligations than to sell into a non existent bid

item.title: Why didn't you buy SOXX last year? — 15 replies — 7.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why didn't you buy SOXX last year?

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-05-06 19:38 UTC

OP

Why didn't you buy SOXX last year?

Early replies (first 3)

62198076
>>62198030
Because I bought SOXL instead scrub

62198106
>>62198076
what made you want to buy that before it mooned? assuming not a larp

62198133
>>62198106
I’ve been swing trading it since 2020 just caught it at the right time with right temperament to say fuck it and buy. Sold at 125 a couple of days ago so lol

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62198147
>>62198133
what else do you swing trade? btc? anything else looking good for the future?

62198271
>>62198106
>>62198147
nta but i also bought soxl. i bought a bunch as far back as 2024 at $60 a share, then DCA'd all the way down until it dropped under $9, then i went in big. i work in software so i knew what was coming. i don't have 'the next big thing' to tell you about at the moment. when it comes along i'll let people know, like i did with soxl, and will be ignored, like i was with soxl, and we'll all be having this same exact discussion again. fwiw i haven't sold yet.

62198295
>>62198271
where do you usually hang out at to tell anons your predictions? So far the only thing I'm buying now is VT and BTC

62198323
>>62198295
here and /o/.

62198330
>>62198323
I meant what part of /biz/. Just random posts or any generals? Guessing /smg/?

62198379
>>62198330
no i just randomly post things like "buy soxl, thank me later" in random threads when talking to people aand never elaborate.

62198391
>>62198379
got it. Hope to find your next prediction

62198413
>>62198076
>>62198030
Never heard of them before they pumped

62198512
>>62198133
Why did you sell?

62198524
>>62198512
Hit my exit price and I didn’t want to be on the wrong side of a triple leverage ETF dumping (has happened before)

62198571
>>62198330
Holy fuck bro get off his meat and think for yourself ffs

62198581
>>62198030
I will.

OP

LUNC just dropped a zero
None of you retards listened
You could of been rich
Instead you're all Sidelined for lunc szn

62188919
>>62188819

62188994
>>62188819
ok, now zoom out
kek baggies

62189013
>>62188994

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62192467
>>62192456
War buys?
That's what my stuff was and zero way to anticipate when Trump would say something to kill any gains or boost something you weren't touching.

See you at 1 cent

62192832
>>62192185
>It just went over the resistance
>it's not stoppping

I guess linkies are still stinkies then

62192837
Lol bought this shit years ago, I genuinely thought it was dead?

62192905
>>62192837
if you bought it when it crashed, it was never over.

CZ said he would burn coins with a protocol and it's still burning. From that point it was never dead, and once again, CZ delivers

62192915
>>62192905
Yeah, but it was half this much a week ago. It's already gained like 100%, I'm up $84 from like $8 a week back.

62193017
Haha, drop back. Hold steady bois

62193037
I'm staking this but haven't checked in years. My terra station app won't open or update. Wut do?

62193043
>>62193037
Goy here btw

62193161
>>62193037
original terra station shut down,
new terra station is being relaunched by vultsig/thorchain after acquiring.

use Keplr

62193197
>>62193037

My terra station app works.

62193289
>>62192216
>im up $55!

>>62192451
>im up $64!

>>62192915
>im up $84!
jfc lunc does a 3x and these are the gains people are getting excited about?

62193316
>>62188819
NIGGA YOU HOLDER LUNC
LOSER UNC SHIT NIGGA HAHAHAHAHAHAHA

62193335
>>62193289
I'm up $350 on the daily
>>62193316
My LUNC bags have outperformed 99% of crypto since January.

Stay mad seething linkie. This trades obviously not for you. See you at $119

62193503
checked back in on my staking rewards and netted a grand total SEVEN DOLLARS

62193537
>>62193503
Technically you got more, staking rewards don't show the USTC reward value earned. Which will be worth thousands when it repegs

62193550
>>62193335
I hold TOSHI nigga you don’t even know bout me shit loser unc nigga

62193557
>>62193335
I hope you enjoyed it while it lasted. It looks like the trade bots are dumping it

62193571
>>62193550
>toshi
Kek poorfag. Probably bought the top too

62193595
>>62193571
You wish nigga I bought in August 23
Probably made more money than you’ve ever had in your life too kek nigga

62193601
>>62193161
>>62193197
LET ME IN

LET ME IIIIIIIIIIIINNNNNNN!!!!!

SERIOUSLY GUYS IM SCARED ALL MY LUNC IS TOAST

62193617
it is not wise to hold a coin that the majority of people holding are hoping and praying goes up to recoup their losses on

62193760
>>62193617
It's whatever. Just don't dump a crazy amount in. $1000 or less and let it go, just take out what you put in and maybe 50% profit after a certain point. Let the rest go.

99% of these coins have been sitting so it's cool to see them wake up.

62193800
>>62193760
Lol who are you kidding?

62194434
Plans are underway to reactivate Mirror protocol
The proposal will be submitted on the eve of the Terra Luna collapse (May 12th)
Accumulation time is over.
You've been warned

62194784
>>62192173
well, its best you hold on to it before you rope when this dumps red

or either I'll rope if this does fly to the moon like what NASA did on April 1st

62195716
>>62190453
Redditors died over this coin. I find it abhorrent that you thought people self deleting over this is comfy. You’re a disgusting person.

62196396
>>62194784

Oh I'm holding,

I'm holding stronger than you would be holding your mom if she fell off a cliff.

I've seen things you people wouldn't believe.

Layer 2 cryptos on fire, off the head and shoulder of Bitcoin.

Empires of wallets burned in days.

I watched green candles glitter in the dark near the Tradingview galaxy.

All those moments will be lost in charts, like tears in rain.

Time to hold.

62196412
>>62196396
>pic.rel

62196464
>>62190308
kek that vocaroo

item.title: REALITY CHECK — 6 replies — 5.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
REALITY CHECK

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-05-06 20:34 UTC

OP

Why people ask financial advice were? On 4CHAN of all places seems like the best way to speedrun bankruptcy LOL. Asking any advice on 4CHAN is a bad idea period....

Early replies (first 3)

62198249
>>62198151
i became a millionaire thanks for /biz/

62198306
If you have a brain to filter out obviously retarded suggestions then 4chan is a decent place to find advice on any topic. Wouldn't expect someone dependent on LLMs to outsource their critical thinking to be capable of that though. For you I'd suggest getting back to work, wagie.

62198515
It's easy, just do the opposite of /biz/
>Don't buy intel, it's dead and left behind and sucks the cock of AMD and Nvidya!
So then it becomes a must buy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62198553
>>62198151
At first: think for yourself!
It is not applicable for every single post.
>"Some folks think the "anon" has ... insider secrets ..."
If you replace secrets with knowledge.
As was proven to be true with the Epstein complex.

62198807
>>62198151
Im sure a sane person enjoys an AI personality like that

62198894
>>62198151
If you would have gone all in on Bitcoin and hodl like they told you to you would be a multimillionaire. I didn't listen and am still a wagie.

item.title: KELPDAO bends the knee and pays up — 17 replies — 4.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
KELPDAO bends the knee and pays up

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-05-06 17:57 UTC

OP

Ooofff not a good look for so called Chainlink killers (kek)

https://x.com/kelpdao/status/2051755467328913637
>After the recent LayerZero exploit, we are taking steps to ensure rsETH is fully secure, which is why we are migrating to @chainlink CCIP.

>From the April 18 incident, it is clear that LayerZero's own infrastructure was exploited, resulting in $300M in losses across DeFi. Independent reports from SEAL 911, Chainalysis, and other major leading security researchers all point to the same origin.

Early replies (first 3)

62193835
>>62193799
Yikes
It’s become blatantly clear that there’s only one oracle solution

62193937
>>62193799
>it is clear that LayerZero's own infrastructure was exploited
Just because you assert something doesn't make it true

62193998
fuck stinks
hate em all
think they suck
simple as

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62194150
i think it's great that chainlink is giving them access for free in exchange for negative tweets about their competition. link marines gladly pay for this drama

62194249
fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you fuck you

62194629
KelpDao's CEO should be made to explain the retarded decision on using the bare minimum security setup in the first place in front of audience. These twitter posts of "here's what happened it's not my fault" don't cut. These people need shaming so other developers can get clued in to stop embarrassing the industry with their lazy shitty security decisions.

62194668
>>62193937
the bridge is secured by a single layerzero validator. so either they were exploited or the validator did the crime. not a good look either way

62194688
chainlink are so euphoric about this that rory has made rare appearances in both telegram AND reddit to trumpet the news

62195824
>>62193937
how can you defend a service that had 1 secure node and no decentralization?

62195845
HAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHAH SUCKS TO SUCK
ENJOY THE 300M HACK YOU STUPID FAGGOTS

LAYERZERO (ZERO FUNDS INDEED) GOT ABSOLUTELY MOGGED IN PUBLIC AND CANT EVER RECOVER FROM THIS

SERGEY'S BEEN TOLD YA

>>62193937
>>62194249
>>62194688
Who of you is this? You just got hidden in the replies LOL
https://nitter.poast.org/kupr1k/status/2051763779315073237


No amount of third world screeching (pic related) or Nigerian hand wringing will make KelpDAO (or anyone who has seen this shitshow) go back to the LZ scammers. They are TOAST, no respectable body will EVER risk their shit by working with these sort of lowlife bad actors.

62196041
>>62194629
Doesnt matter considering LZs own infra was literally hacked so kys

62196063
>>62194729

62196734
>>62196041
And they still went for the bare minimum security regardless. Not only did they go with a low tier vendor in terms of security, they went with the bare minimum standard of what the low tier vendor offered. Then they should explain both of those in front of others when confessing their sins to the public of their negligence on security for a $300M protocol.

No conflicts with my overall point.

62196988
>>62196041
L0 also havent addressed how their own system got hacked yet. Its gunna be funny.

62197022
>>62193799
chainlink is the only serious player in all of crypto it's embarrassing

62198135

https://x.com/the_dude__80/status/2052078826809663819

item.title: I haven't claimed my chainlink staking rewards yet but I'm going to tomorrow. — 41 replies — 3.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
I haven't claimed my chainlink staking rewards yet but I'm going to tomorrow.

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-05-06 08:20 UTC

OP

I haven't claimed my chainlink staking rewards yet but I'm going to tomorrow.

Is there anything worth keeping? Brickken seems to be the only token that hasn't seen an absolute token price collapse. There are a few other ones that don't seem that to have collapsed totally but most of them have.

Should I just claim and sell it all instantly or do any of these projects have any promise in them? I do have a bunch of SXT staking from the previous years LINK staking rewards but that seems to have been a mistkae looking at the token price

Early replies (first 3)

62186457
>>62186432
Brickken devs run out of tokens to dump in June. FDV @500 million would place it at $3.50 which is a 27x from here. Don't know if it can hit 500 mil mktcap but Im holding for the forseeable future.

62186460
>>62186432
i didnt claim anything as im from the EU and didnt wanna deal with regulatory shit.
my rewards would have been only like 1-2k usd if i sold them immediately so not like i missed out

62186470
>>62186460
im in the EU too, its not a problem in my country. only thing that is a regulation clusterfuck and tax nightmare in my country is crypto lending and also liquidity pools

>>62186457
interesting, thanks

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62187003
What was the deal with these? I haven't claimed yet, are we waiting for a date? Does it still count as early withdraw to take now? What do? Nothing??

62187007
>>62187003
"early" withdrawal period is over, you get the full amount

I just withdrew my sxt and folk (kek), havent bothered to sell

62187349
>>62186925
We're not boiling the ocean here. You can use Chainlink as a data consumer without feeds, nodes, or paying for Chainlink services.
If you use Polymarket deterministic markets, you've used Chainlink

62187369
>>62186929
>what about it?

he's talking about the one time in crypto history that holding a shitcoin airdrop worked out. in this case uniswap timing was probably as lucky as it can get as they sent it out right before the historic '21 bulllrun when everything including nfts ran hard

very fitting that's the example used by a boyscout as that's the time period where they are mentally stuck, hence the uncle rico moniker.


forget about the thousands of examples of airdrops that have crasehd for holders since then, including every single shitcoin in the build program

isnt truf down like 99% now lmao

62187395
>>62187369
idk man I'm pretty happy to have sold it eons ago, did you take a look at the chart?

62187409
>>62187395
for uniswap?

yeah it was a good idea to hold it for a bit and then sell on the '21 runup

62187417
>>62186432
I am glad I sold all that shit the second I was able to claim. Unfortunately, I also did the same with Uni and Hype airdrops.

62187439
>>62186432
I bought in 2017 and never steaked. How do I into

62187586
>>62186432
I early claimed everything and moved into LINK when it was like $8. No regrets. Fuck BUILD.

62187712
>>62187439
wait for sergey to expand the pool
